articles.original_title: Why LeBron James Felt It Was Time To Move On Despite Lakers Wanting Him Back
articles.summary: LeBron James rocked the NBA world on Tuesday morning when it was reported that he informed the Los Angeles Lakers he would playing elsewhere in 2026-27. articles.title: Lakers Guarantee Bronny James' 2026‑27 Contract
articles.original_title: Lakers guarantee Bronny James’ contract for 2026-27 season
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers have officially guaranteed Bronny James' contract for the 2026‑27 season, locking him in at a $2.3 million salary for the upcoming year. The move follows a promising sophomore campaign and was reported by Spotrac analyst Keith Smith.
key_points: Bronny James' contract is guaranteed for the 2026‑27 season at $2.3 million.
The guarantee was confirmed after his sophomore season showed growth.
Spotrac’s Keith Smith disclosed the roster move.

articles.title: Lakers Guarantee Bronny James' 2026‑27 Contract – Silver Screen and Roll
articles.original_title: Lakers guarantee Bronny James’ contract for 2026-27 season - Silver Screen and Roll
articles.summary: Silver Screen and Roll reiterates that the Lakers have secured Bronny James' contract for the 2026‑27 season, confirming the team's continued investment in the young guard. No additional details beyond the guarantee were provided.
key_points: Bronny James' contract is locked in for the 2026‑27 season.
The announcement mirrors earlier reports from other outlets.
No new financial or roster information was added.

articles.title: Jeanie Buss & Lakers Issue Statement Thanking LeBron James
articles.original_title: Jeanie Buss & Lakers Release Statement Thanking LeBron James
articles.summary: The Lakers released a public statement, signed by Jeanie Buss, expressing gratitude to LeBron James as he announced his departure in free agency. The statement highlighted his contributions over eight seasons and wished him success with his next team.
key_points: LeBron James announced he will leave the Lakers in free agency.
Jeanie Buss thanked him for his eight‑year tenure with the franchise.
The organization described James as a valued member of the Lakers family.

articles.title: Reddit Post: Throwback When James Honored Kobe
articles.original_title: Who cutting onions? Throwback when James honored Kobe
articles.summary: A Reddit user shared a nostalgic post recalling an occasion when a player named James paid tribute to Kobe Bryant, accompanied by a link to the original content and a discussion thread. The post contains no new reporting, only a fan‑generated memory.
key_points: User‑generated content recalling a Kobe tribute.
Includes a link to the original post and comments.
No official news or statements are provided.

articles.title: Lakers Release Statement on LeBron James, Call Him ‘Cherished Part’ of Family
articles.original_title: Lakers release statement on LeBron James, call him ‘cherished part’ of Lakers family
articles.summary: The Lakers issued an official statement confirming that LeBron James will depart the franchise in free agency, describing his nearly decade‑long stint as a “cherished part” of the organization. The statement acknowledges his impact while noting the end of his tenure.
key_points: LeBron James will leave the Lakers after the current season.
The team called him a cherished member of the Lakers family.
His tenure with the franchise spanned close to ten years.

articles.title: Center Kristaps Porzingis re-signing with Warriors on two-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
articles.original_title: Center Kristaps Porzingis re-signing with Warriors on two-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
articles.summary: Center Kristaps Porzingis has reached agreement on a two-year, $40 million contract to remain with the Golden State Warriors, according to a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations.  This keeps Porzingis off the market as the NBA's free-agency period begins.  The 30-year-old Latvian joined Golden State at the February trade deadline from Atlanta in a swap that sent Buddy Hield and Jonathan Kuminga to the Hawks.
